self_report.reflection: This is the standard statement of Putnam 1996 B-2. Taking logarithms, the inequality becomes 1/2·∫₀^{2n-1} ln(x)dx < Σ ln(2k-1) < 1/2·∫₀^{2n+1} ln(x)dx, which follows from concavity/monotonicity of ln via midpoint and endpoint Riemann comparisons over intervals of width 2. Numerical checks at n=1,2,3 confirm strict inequalities.
self_report.notes: Recognized as the exact canonical form of Putnam 1996 B-2; small-case numerics confirm.
